titleStmt.title: SII 42.292: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 292. (A.R. No. 60 of 1956-57.) Karimaddula, Nandyal Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab paved into the floor around the darga (mosque).
Dated Śaka 1498 (wrong for 1488), Kshaya, Āshāḍha, śu. 12 corresponding to A.D. 1566, June 29.

Registers a gift of land as sarvamānya to goddess Akkaladēvī of Karimaddula by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Timmayadēva-mahārāja of the Ātrēya-gōtra, on the occasion of utthāna-dvādaśī. The gift-land lay in Karimaddula in Poṭlapāḍu in Peḍakaṇṭi-sīma which was given to the donor as nāyaṅkara by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kavaruṣaṁbulu 1498 Agunēṭi kṣaya saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu
12 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra sadā
si(śi)vadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁ
hvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍa
ṁgānu Ātri(trē)yasagōtra pavitṛ (tru)layina śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla nārayadēvamahā
rājuluṁgāri pautṛ(truṁ)ḍu narasiṁgayamahā
rājuluṁgāri putṛ(truṁ)ḍu timayadēva mahārāju
luṁgāru karimaddula yakkalidēviki yiccina bhūdāna
dharmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu svāmi sadāsi(śi)vadēvamahā
rāyalu mā nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina peḍakaṁṭi [śī(sī)]
malōni poṭlapāṭiki jellē karimaddulagrāmāna yakali
dēviki pūrvāna poṭlapāṭi raṁgarājugāru dhāra
vōsi cellivaccēdi vāviḷlakuṁṭṭakiṁdda tirumala pa
lle teṟuvuku para(ḍa)maṭa vo(va)rimaḍi pātika yarajeru
kaḍa gomuna tirupāṭi teruvuku vu(U)ttarāna cireḍla
vāri cēni staḷaṁ kha . 2 . yī staḷānne vudhāna(Utthāna) dvādasi(śi) puṇyakāla
maṁddu nēmu dhāravōsi yicciri kha ÉÓ vubhayaṁ
nnu yirusānu varimaḍi pātikānu sarvamānyaṁgānu Ācēṁ[drā¨rkaṁ]
gānu calugānu yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . yī(Ī) dharmānaku yevvaru tappi
nānu tama tallidaṁḍhṛ(ḍru)la vāraṇāsilō caṁppina pāpāna bōduru .
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt sva¨rgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁpadaṁ(m) . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 42.292 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
